2354550.name: NukeMark
2354550.description:
About Nukemark™
Nukemark™ by Ezbench Solutions AS is a powerful benchmarking and performance testing tool designed for gamers, hardware enthusiasts, and professionals who demand the best from their PCs. Whether you’re optimizing your system for competitive gaming or evaluating hardware upgrades, Nukemark provides the precision and insights you need.

With advanced stress tests, detailed metrics, and visually stunning benchmarks, Nukemark highlights your system’s strengths and identifies potential bottlenecks. Our intuitive interface makes it easy to measure performance, analyze results, and fine-tune your PC for maximum efficiency.

Built with both casual users and experts in mind, Nukemark goes beyond simple benchmarks by offering tools to help you understand how your system performs under real-world conditions. Equip yourself with the knowledge to unlock your hardware's full potential and ensure it’s always ready to perform at its best.

Nukemark comes with an online database for tracking your performance over time.
